sentences.arabic: رَأَتْ أَمَلُ أَنَّ كُلَّ مَاءِ الزُّجَاجَةِ اخْتَفَى.
sentences.translation: Amal je vidjela da je sva voda iz flaše nestala.
sentences.translationEn: Amal saw that all the water in the bottle had disappeared.

sentences.translation: Stavila je flaše juče i bila je puna.
sentences.translationEn: She put the bottle yesterday and it was full.

sentences.arabic: فَكَّرَتْ وَتَذَكَّرَتْ أَنَّهَا رَأَتِ الشَّمْسَ تُسَلِّطُ عَلَيْهَا النَّهَارَ كُلَّهُ.
sentences.translation: Razmišljala je i prisjetila se da je sunce cijeli dan sijalo na nju.
sentences.translationEn: She thought and remembered that the sun had been shining on it all day.
She asked her teacher about the reason.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَ الْمُعَلِّمُ أَنَّ الْمَاءَ تَبَخَّرَ بِسَبَبِ الْحَرَارَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učitelj je objasnio da je voda isparila zbog topline.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher explained that the water evaporated because of the heat.
